Description: Precondition: Ensure the ML Service is running and all model files are loaded. Input: POST a valid JPEG image of a registered driver's face to /api/login/. Expected: Response code 200 with driver_id, driver_name, and age in the response body. PASS if the response matches the expected output; FAIL otherwise.

Precondition: Ensure the ML Service is running and ArcFace model is missing. Input: POST a valid JPEG image to /api/login/. Expected: Response code 503 indicating the ArcFace model is not loaded. PASS if the response code is 503; FAIL otherwise.

Precondition: Ensure a pending registration exists with a valid pending_id. Input: POST a valid JPEG image of a driving license to /api/login/verify-dl with the pending_id. Expected: Response code 200 with driver_id created and dl_number extracted. PASS if the response matches the expected output; FAIL otherwise.

Precondition: Ensure the DEMO_RESET_ENABLED environment variable is set to 1. Input: POST a request to /api/demo/reset-driver with a valid driver_id. Expected: Response code 200 and the driver record is deleted from MongoDB. PASS if the driver is deleted and response code is 200; FAIL otherwise.

Precondition: Ensure the ML Service is running and all model files are loaded. Input: Connect to ws://<host>/api/stream?driver_id=<id> and send a JPEG frame. Expected: Receive JSON metrics and an annotated JPEG with HUD overlay. PASS if both JSON and JPEG are received correctly; FAIL otherwise.

Precondition: Ensure a pending registration exists with a valid pending_id. Input: Connect to ws://<host>/api/login/ws/dl-verify with the pending_id and stream frames. Expected: Registration status changes to 'completed' and the connection closes with code 1000. PASS if the status is 'completed' and the connection closes correctly; FAIL otherwise.

Precondition: Ensure the ML Service is running and the temporal_attention_lstm.pth model is loaded. Input: Start a real-time video stream and look away consistently. Expected: LSTM predicts distraction and alert_type is 'distraction'. PASS if the alert is triggered correctly; FAIL otherwise.

Precondition: Ensure the ML Service is running and all model files are loaded. Input: POST a request to /api/safety-score/compute with a valid driver_id and score_date. Precondition: Ensure the ML Service is running and all models are loaded. Input: Send a GET request to /health/models with deep=true. Expected: The response should include detailed model status with all models loaded and operational. PASS if all models are reported as loaded and operational; FAIL if any model is missing or not operational.

Precondition: Ensure the API Gateway is operational. Input: Send a GET request to /health. Expected: The response should be a JSON object with status 'ok'. PASS if the status is 'ok'; FAIL if the status is anything else or the response is not a valid JSON.

Precondition: Ensure the ML Service is running. Input: Send a GET request to /health on port 8001. Expected: The response should be a JSON object with status 'ok' and service 'ml-service'. PASS if both fields are correct; FAIL if any field is incorrect or missing.

Precondition: Ensure the distraction detection model is loaded. Input: Send a GET request to /health/models. Expected: The response should include the status of the distraction detection model as 'ok'. PASS if the model status is 'ok'; FAIL if the model status is not 'ok' or missing.

Precondition: Ensure all models are loaded in the ML Service. Input: Send a GET request to /health/models with full_qwen=true. Expected: The response should include the full Qwen weights loaded status. PASS if the full Qwen weights are loaded; FAIL if they are not loaded or missing.

Precondition: Ensure the safety scoring API is operational. Input: Send a POST request to /api/safety-score/compute with a valid driver_id and score_date. Expected: The response should include a computed safety score. PASS if the score is computed correctly; FAIL if the score is missing or incorrect.

Precondition: Ensure the alerts API is operational. Input: Send a GET request to /api/alerts with a valid driver_id and limit. Expected: The response should include a list of alerts for the specified driver. PASS if the alerts are correctly listed; FAIL if the alerts are missing or incorrect.

Precondition: Ensure the sessions API is operational. Input: Send a POST request to /api/sessions/start with a valid driver_id. Expected: The response should include a session_id and status 'active'. PASS if the session starts correctly; FAIL if the session does not start or the response is incorrect.

Precondition: Ensure the sessions API is operational. Input: Send a POST request to /api/sessions/end with a valid session_id. Expected: The response should include the session end_time and status 'ended'. PASS if the session ends correctly; FAIL if the session does not end or the response is incorrect.

Precondition: Ensure the safety score API is operational. Input: Send a GET request to /api/safety-score with a valid driver_id and date range. Expected: The response should include an array of daily scores. PASS if the scores are correctly listed; FAIL if the scores are missing or incorrect.

Precondition: Ensure the demo reset feature is enabled. Input: Send a POST request to /api/demo/reset-driver with a valid driver_id. Expected: The driver should be deleted from the database. PASS if the driver is deleted; FAIL if the driver is not deleted or the response is incorrect.

Precondition: Ensure the demo reset feature is disabled. Input: Send a POST request to /api/demo/reset-driver with a valid driver_id. Expected: The response should be 404 indicating the endpoint is not available. PASS if the response is 404; FAIL if the response is not 404.

Precondition: Ensure the WebSocket stream is operational. Input: Connect to ws://<host>/api/stream with a valid driver_id and send JPEG frames. Expected: Receive JSON metrics and annotated JPEGs. PASS if the metrics and JPEGs are received correctly; FAIL if they are missing or incorrect.

Precondition: Ensure the WebSocket DL verification is operational. Input: Connect to ws://<host>/api/login/ws/dl-verify with a valid pending_id and stream frames. Expected: Receive annotated responses and status 'completed'. PASS if the responses and status are correct; FAIL if they are missing or incorrect.

Precondition: Ensure the recalibration endpoint is operational. Input: Send a GET request to /api/recalibrate. Expected: The system should reset the distraction detector calibration. PASS if recalibration occurs; FAIL if it does not or the response is incorrect.

Precondition: Ensure the driver registration API is operational. Input: Send a POST request to /api/login/register with valid name, age, and image_base64. Expected: Receive a pending_id with driver_id as null. PASS if the pending_id is returned correctly; FAIL if it is not returned or incorrect.

Precondition: Ensure the driver login API is operational. Input: Send a POST request to /api/login with a registered driver's face image. Expected: Receive a 200 status with correct driver_id and driver_name. PASS if login is successful; FAIL if login fails or response is incorrect.

Precondition: Ensure the driver login API is operational. Input: Send a POST request to /api/login with an unregistered face image. Expected: Receive a 401 status indicating face not recognized. PASS if the status is 401; FAIL if the status is not 401 or response is incorrect.

Precondition: Ensure the driver login API is operational. Input: Send a POST request to /api/login with a registered driver_id and matching face image. Expected: Receive a 200 status with correct driver_id. PASS if login is successful; FAIL if login fails or response is incorrect.

Precondition: Ensure the driver login API is operational. Input: Send a POST request to /api/login with a registered driver_id and a different face image. Expected: Receive a 401 status indicating face not recognized. PASS if the status is 401; FAIL if the status is not 401 or response is incorrect.

Precondition: Ensure the driver login API is operational. Input: Send a POST request to /api/login with an empty image file. Expected: Receive a 400 status with message 'Empty image'. PASS if the status and message are correct; FAIL if they are not.

Precondition: Ensure the driver login API is operational. Input: Send a POST request to /api/login with a corrupt image file. Expected: Receive a 400 status with message 'Could not decode image'. PASS if the status and message are correct; FAIL if they are not.

Precondition: Ensure the driver login API is operational. Input: Send a POST request to /api/login with an image containing no face. Expected: Receive a 400 status with message 'No face detected in image (MediaPipe)'. PASS if the status and message are correct; FAIL if they are not.

Precondition: Ensure the driver login API is operational. Input: Send a POST request to /api/login with an image where the face is too small. Expected: Receive a 400 status with message 'No face detected in image (ArcFace)'. PASS if the status and message are correct; FAIL if they are not.

Precondition: Ensure the ArcFace model is missing. Input: Send a POST request to /api/login with any face image. Expected: Receive a 503 status indicating models not loaded. PASS if the status is 503; FAIL if the status is not 503 or response is incorrect.

Precondition: Ensure the driver registration API is operational. Input: Send a POST request to /api/login/register with missing image_base64. Expected: Receive a 400 status with message 'Missing image_base64'. PASS if the status and message are correct; FAIL if they are not.

Precondition: Ensure the driver registration API is operational. Input: Send a POST request to /api/login/register with invalid image_base64. Expected: Receive a 400 status with message 'Invalid image_base64'. PASS if the status and message are correct; FAIL if they are not.

Precondition: Ensure the driver registration API is operational. Input: Send a POST request to /api/login/register with an image containing no face. Expected: Receive a 400 status with message 'No valid face detected'. PASS if the status and message are correct; FAIL if they are not.

Precondition: Ensure the driver registration API is operational. Input: Register a driver and wait more than 300 seconds before finalizing. Expected: Attempt to finalize should receive a 400 status with message 'Pending registration expired or not found'. PASS if the status and message are correct; FAIL if they are not.

Precondition: Ensure the driver registration API is operational. Input: Send a POST request to /api/login/finalize-dl with valid details for a pending registration. Expected: Receive a 200 status and driver created in DB. PASS if the driver is created; FAIL if not created or response is incorrect.

Precondition: Ensure the driving license verification API is operational. Input: Send a POST request to /api/login/verify-dl with a valid pending_id and clear DL photo. Expected: Receive a 200 status with driver created and dl_number extracted. PASS if the driver is created; FAIL if not created or response is incorrect.

Precondition: Ensure the driving license verification API is operational. Input: Send a POST request to /api/login/verify-dl with an invalid/unreadable DL photo. Expected: Receive a 400 status with verdict not 'valid'. PASS if the status and message are correct; FAIL if they are not.

Precondition: Ensure the driving license verification API is operational. Input: Send a POST request to /api/login/verify-dl with a DL photo that has a name mismatch. Expected: Receive a 400 status with message 'Mismatched Name'. PASS if the status and message are correct; FAIL if they are not.

Precondition: Ensure the driving license verification API is operational. Input: Send a POST request to /api/login/verify-dl with a DL photo that has an age mismatch. Expected: Receive a 400 status with message 'Mismatched Age'. PASS if the status and message are correct; FAIL if they are not.

Precondition: Ensure the driving license verification API is operational. Input: Send a POST request to /api/login/verify-dl with a DL photo that has an unreadable DL number. Expected: Receive a 400 status with message 'Could not read DL number from licence'. PASS if the status and message are correct; FAIL if they are not.

Precondition: Ensure the driving license verification API is operational. Input: Send a POST request to /api/login/verify-dl with an expired pending_id. Expected: Receive a 400 status with message 'Pending registration expired or not found'. PASS if the status and message are correct; FAIL if they are not.

Precondition: Ensure the WebSocket DL verification is operational. Input: Connect to ws://<host>/api/login/ws/dl-verify with an invalid pending_id. Expected: The socket should close immediately with code 1008. PASS if the socket closes with code 1008; FAIL if it does not.

Precondition: Ensure the WebSocket DL verification is operational. Input: Connect to ws://<host>/api/login/ws/dl-verify and send two consecutive invalid DL frames. Expected: First invalid is ignored, second causes 'rejected' status and socket closes with code 1000. PASS if behavior matches; FAIL if it does not.

Precondition: Ensure the WebSocket stream is operational. Input: Connect to ws://<host>/api/stream and send frames without a face. Expected: Receive driver_state 'no_face' and zero alerts. PASS if the state and alerts are correct; FAIL if they are not.

Precondition: Ensure the WebSocket stream is operational. Input: Connect to ws://<host>/api/stream and send frames with a face. Expected: Every 25 frames, dual-modality recognition should run. PASS if recognition occurs as expected; FAIL if it does not.

Precondition: Ensure the WebSocket stream is operational. Input: Connect to ws://<host>/api/stream and trigger a distraction alert. Expected: A new session record should be created with status 'active'. PASS if the session is created; FAIL if it is not.

Precondition: Ensure the WebSocket stream is operational. Input: Connect to ws://<host>/api/stream and disconnect. Expected: The session end_time should be set and status 'ended'. PASS if the session ends correctly; FAIL if it does not.

Precondition: Ensure the WebSocket stream is operational. Input: Connect to ws://<host>/api/stream and trigger a fatigue alert. Expected: The alerts collection should have a record with correct alert_type and driver_id. PASS if the alert is recorded; FAIL if it is not.

Precondition: Ensure the WebSocket stream is operational. Input: Connect to ws://<host>/api/stream and send frames with HUD overlay. Expected: The binary response should be a valid JPEG with width 980 px. PASS if the JPEG is correct; FAIL if it is not.

Precondition: Ensure the distraction detection is operational. Input: Send a GET request to /api/recalibrate and start a stream. Expected: The attention_state should be 'calibrating' and calibrated should be false. PASS if recalibration occurs; FAIL if it does not.

Precondition: Ensure the distraction detection is operational. Input: Start a stream and look away consistently. Expected: After ≥62% of 24 frames vote 'distraction', alert_type should be 'distraction'. PASS if the alert is triggered; FAIL if it is not.

Precondition: Ensure the distraction detection is operational. Input: Start a stream and look away briefly. Expected: Temporal smoothing should filter and final_state should be 'normal'. PASS if the state is 'normal'; FAIL if it is not.

Precondition: Ensure the fatigue detection is operational. Input: Start a stream and close eyes for ≥2 seconds. Expected: fatigue_active should be true and alert_type may be 'fatigue'. PASS if fatigue is detected; FAIL if it is not.

Precondition: Ensure the fatigue detection is operational. Input: Start a stream and yawn with MAR > 0.45 for ≥2 seconds. Expected: fatigue_active should be true. PASS if yawning is detected; FAIL if it is not.

Precondition: Ensure the sleep detection is operational. Input: Start a stream and maintain PERCLOS ≥ 0.4 and eye closure ≥ 2.0 s. Expected: alert_type should be 'sleep' and driver_state 'sleep'. PASS if sleep is detected; FAIL if it is not.
